text: Karsyn Schaeffer approached Jonah Kramer, Karsyn Schaeffer's smile as bright as the sunlight glinting off the ice. "Beautiful, isn't it. " Karsyn Schaeffer remarked, gesturing towards a half-finished swan, the swan's graceful neck stretching towards the sky.
context: Jonah Kramer is observing ice sculptures in Washington Square Park.
